temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) In a dimly lit, dark room, a man in a suit and glasses, with a gold watch, holds a cigarette to his lips. He looks intently at another man, whose back is to the camera, and asks a question. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense confrontation, establishing a power dynamic between the man in the suit and the other man.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Calm, questioning. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene cuts to a different man with a mustache, who is smoking a cigarette. He looks shocked and wide-eyed as he listens to the first man, who is now yelling at him. (Storyline: The tension escalates as the man in the suit's tone shifts from questioning to aggressive, and a new character is introduced who is clearly intimidated by the confrontation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Aggressive, demanding. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:06-00:09) The man in the suit continues to yell at the man with the mustache, who is now identified as the protagonist. The protagonist looks increasingly distressed and intimidated by the shouting. (Storyline: The power imbalance is reinforced as the man in the suit repeatedly orders the protagonist to leave, who is unable to respond.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Loud, angry, and commanding. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
